description.value:
Prerequisite: Cha 15. To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the War Hero tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned War Hero, you gain +1 bonus to weapon attack and damage rolls (morale).
description.summary: Summon War Hero tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. War Heros; +1 bonus to weapon attack and damage rolls (morale) within 50 ft of summon.
